comment: Recorded model outputs replayed by ScriptedChatModel so the agent-eval harness runs keyless end to end. Order matches fixtures/agent_eval_cases.jsonl.

answer_model.content: Import CORSMiddleware and add it to your app with add_middleware, listing the allowed origins [tutorial-cors#use-corsmiddleware].

args.body: TestClient is now based on httpx; install it with pip install httpx.
